name: Aoki's Shave Ice
tagline: Directly across from Matsumoto with a fraction of the line — locals' quiet favorite since 1981.
parking: Street spots fill fast — same parking situation as Matsumoto
talkStory: The Aoki family has been in Haleiwa since the plantation era and opened their shave ice stand in 1981 -- making them nearly as old as Matsumoto but without the hype. Located directly across the street, Aoki's is where North Shore locals go to skip the Matsumoto tourist line. Their homemade azuki beans are cooked fresh daily, not from a can. The green tea and lychee flavors are particular standouts that Matsumoto doesn't offer.
